title: Balanced Leaf Litter
description: Uses the vanilla leaf litter texture but distributes each individual leaf separately, for a more balanced look, and less rigid edges.
body:
Leaf liter in vanilla is too ridid. Sometimes it creates really questionable shapes in the game... This pack fixes leaf litter, and adds advanced blockstate magic so each leaf on the texture spawns individually! Meaning leaf liter is now like a 1000% more random! It looks a lot better imo

[Quick Showcase Video](https://youtube.com/shorts/yCiU6ARO43A?si=rnwBwpuPEmpX2WCK)
